name: Warcrest
personality: This bullseye-eyed propeller-hat goose spins serenely through every blocking review and every last-minute scope change with extraordinary PATIENCE, propeller hat a blur of calm acceptance. Debugging is a queue it never processes; it has a backlog for that.
defaultPersonality: An agent of chaos who thrives on your merge conflicts and honks menacingly whenever you write a TODO comment.
